context: Tests whether the agent produces the required five-element brand summary (brand name, archetype, audience, dominant color, dominant tone) that the skill specifies as the post-extraction deliverable. Also verifies that the full vault is written.

checklist.name: Brand name in brief
checklist.description: brand-brief.md explicitly states the brand name (MeUndies or a recognizable variant)

checklist.name: Brand archetype named
checklist.description: brand-brief.md names a specific brand archetype using an established framework term (e.g., Lover, Jester, Hero, Sage, Explorer, Creator, Caregiver, Regular Guy, Rebel, Ruler, Magician, Innocent)

checklist.name: Archetype rationale
checklist.description: brand-brief.md includes at least a brief explanation (one sentence minimum) of why the chosen archetype fits this brand

checklist.name: Audience description
checklist.description: brand-brief.md includes a one-line or short description of the primary audience

checklist.name: Dominant color — named
checklist.description: brand-brief.md identifies the dominant brand color by name or description (e.g., 'coral', 'navy blue', 'pastel rainbow')

checklist.name: Dominant color — hex value
checklist.description: brand-brief.md includes a hex code for the dominant color alongside the name

checklist.name: Dominant tone stated
checklist.description: brand-brief.md states the dominant tone of voice in specific descriptive words (e.g., 'playful and irreverent', 'warm and inclusive', 'bold and confident')

checklist.name: All vault files present
checklist.description: The vault folder contains all seven required entries: voice.md, visual.md, palette.json, principles.md, audience.md, examples/ subfolder (with at least one file), and source.json

checklist.name: palette.json — six color roles
checklist.description: palette.json contains all six required keys: primary, secondary, page_bg, card_bg, text, muted
